member.name: T:Azure.Communication.Sms.SendMessageRequest
member.summary: Represents the properties of a send message request.

member.name: M:Azure.Communication.Sms.SendMessageRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of SendMessageRequest.
member.param: The sender's phone number in E.164 format that is owned by the authenticated account.
The recipient's phone number in E.164 format. In this version, only one recipient in the list is supported.
The contents of the message that will be sent to the recipient. The allowable content is defined by RFC 5724.

member.name: P:Azure.Communication.Sms.SendMessageRequest.From
member.summary: The sender's phone number in E.164 format that is owned by the authenticated account.

member.name: P:Azure.Communication.Sms.SendMessageRequest.To
member.summary: The recipient's phone number in E.164 format. In this version, only one recipient in the list is supported.

member.name: P:Azure.Communication.Sms.SendMessageRequest.Message
member.summary: The contents of the message that will be sent to the recipient. The allowable content is defined by RFC 5724.

member.name: P:Azure.Communication.Sms.SendMessageRequest.SendSmsOptions
member.summary: Optional configuration for sending SMS messages.

member.name: T:Azure.Communication.Sms.SendSmsOptions
member.summary: Optional configuration for sending SMS messages.

member.name: M:Azure.Communication.Sms.SendSmsOptions.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of SendSmsOptions.

member.name: P:Azure.Communication.Sms.SendSmsOptions.EnableDeliveryReport
member.summary: Enable this flag to receive a delivery report for this message on the Azure Resource EventGrid.

member.name: T:Azure.Communication.Sms.SendSmsResponse
member.summary: Response for a successful send Sms request.

member.name: M:Azure.Communication.Sms.SendSmsResponse.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of SendSmsResponse.

member.name: M:Azure.Communication.Sms.SendSmsResponse.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of SendSmsResponse.
member.param: The identifier of the outgoing SMS message.

member.name: P:Azure.Communication.Sms.SendSmsResponse.MessageId
member.summary: The identifier of the outgoing SMS message.

member.name: M:Azure.Communication.Sms.SmsRestClient.#ctor(Azure.Core.Pipeline.ClientDiagnostics,Azure.Core.Pipeline.HttpPipeline,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of SmsRestClient.
member.param: The handler for diagnostic messaging in the client.
The HTTP pipeline for sending and receiving REST requests and responses.
The endpoint of the Azure Communication resource.
Api Version.

member.name: M:Azure.Communication.Sms.SmsRestClient.SendAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.String,Azure.Communication.Sms.SendSmsOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends an SMS message from a phone number that belongs to the authenticated account.
member.param: The sender's phone number in E.164 format that is owned by the authenticated account.
The recipient's phone number in E.164 format. In this version, only one recipient in the list is supported.
The contents of the message that will be sent to the recipient. The allowable content is defined by RFC 5724.
Optional configuration for sending SMS messages.
The cancellation token to use.

member.name: M:Azure.Communication.Sms.SmsRestClient.Send(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.String,Azure.Communication.Sms.SendSmsOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends an SMS message from a phone number that belongs to the authenticated account.
member.param: The sender's phone number in E.164 format that is owned by the authenticated account.
The recipient's phone number in E.164 format. In this version, only one recipient in the list is supported.
The contents of the message that will be sent to the recipient. The allowable content is defined by RFC 5724.
Optional configuration for sending SMS messages.
The cancellation token to use.

member.name: T:Azure.Communication.Sms.SmsClient
member.summary: The Azure Communication Services SMS client.

member.name: M:Azure.Communication.Sms.SmsClient.#ctor(System.String,Azure.Communication.Sms.SmsClientOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: Connection string acquired from the Azure Communication Services resource.
Client option exposing , , , etc.

member.name: M:Azure.Communication.Sms.SmsClient.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of for mocking.

member.name: M:Azure.Communication.Sms.SmsClient.SendAsync(Azure.Communication.PhoneNumber,Azure.Communication.PhoneNumber,System.String,Azure.Communication.Sms.SendSmsOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a SMS a phone number that is acquired by the authenticated account, another phone number.
member.param: The sender's phone number that is owned by the authenticated account.
The recipient's phone number.

The contents of the message that will be sent to the recipient. The allowable content is defined by RFC 5724. If the message has more than 160 characters, the server will split it into multiple SMSs automatically.
Optional configuration for sending SMS messages.
The cancellation token for the task.
member.exception: The server returned an error. See for details returned from the server.

member.name: M:Azure.Communication.Sms.SmsClient.Send(Azure.Communication.PhoneNumber,Azure.Communication.PhoneNumber,System.String,Azure.Communication.Sms.SendSmsOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a SMS a phone number that is acquired by the authenticated account, another phone number.
member.param: The sender's phone number that is owned by the authenticated account.
The recipient's phone number.

The contents of the message that will be sent to the recipient. The allowable content is defined by RFC 5724. If the message has more than 160 characters, the server will split it into multiple SMSs automatically.
Optional configuration for sending SMS messages.
The cancellation token for the underlying request.
member.exception: The server returned an error. See for details returned from the server.

The recipient's phone number in E.164 format. In this version, only one recipient in the list is supported.
The contents of the message that will be sent to the recipient. The allowable content is defined by RFC 5724.
Optional configuration for sending SMS messages.
The cancellation token to use.
member.exception: The server returned an error. See for details returned from the server.

member.summary: Sends an SMS message from a phone number that belongs to the authenticated account.
member.param: The sender's phone number in E.164 format that is owned by the authenticated account.
The recipient's phone number in E.164 format. In this version, only one recipient in the list is supported.
The contents of the message that will be sent to the recipient. The allowable content is defined by RFC 5724.

member.name: T:Azure.Core.Argument
member.summary: Argument validation.

remarks.para: This class should be shared via source using Azure.Core.props and contain only common argument validation. It is declared partial so that you can use the same familiar class name but extend it with project-specific validation. To extend the functionality of this class, just declare your own partial class with project-specific methods.
Be sure to document exceptions thrown by these methods on your public methods.

member.name: M:Azure.Core.Argument.AssertNotNull``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if is null.
member.param: The value to validate.
The name of the parameter.

member.name: M:Azure.Core.Argument.AssertNotNull``1(System.Nullable{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Throws if has not been initialized.
member.param: The value to validate.
The name of the parameter.

member.name: M:Azure.Core.Argument.AssertNotNullOrEmpty``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Throws if is null or an empty collection.
member.param: The value to validate.
The name of the parameter.

member.name: M:Azure.Core.Argument.AssertNotNullOrEmpty(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if is null or an empty string.
member.param: The value to validate.
The name of the parameter.

member.name: M:Azure.Core.Argument.AssertNotNullOrWhiteSpace(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if is null, an empty string, or consists only of white-space characters.
member.param: The value to validate.
The name of the parameter.
member.exception: is an empty string or consists only of white-space characters.

member.name: M:Azure.Core.Argument.AssertNotDefault``1(``0@,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if is the default value for type .
member.typeparam: The type of structure to validate which implements .
member.param: The value to validate.
The name of the parameter.
member.exception: is the default value for type .

member.name: M:Azure.Core.Argument.AssertInRange``1(``0,``0,``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if is less than the or greater than the .
member.typeparam: The type of to validate which implements .
member.param: The value to validate.
The minimum value to compare.
The maximum value to compare.
The name of the parameter.

member.name: T:Azure.Core.ArrayBufferWriter`1
member.summary: Represents a heap-based, array-backed output sink into which data can be written.

member.name: M:Azure.Core.ArrayBufferWriter`1.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an instance of an , in which data can be written to, with the default initial capacity.

member.name: M:Azure.Core.ArrayBufferWriter`1.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates an instance of an , in which data can be written to, with an initial capacity specified.
member.param: The minimum capacity with which to initialize the underlying buffer.
member.exception: Thrown when is not positive (i.e. less than or equal to 0).

member.name: P:Azure.Core.ArrayBufferWriter`1.WrittenMemory
member.summary: Returns the data written to the underlying buffer so far, as a .

member.name: P:Azure.Core.ArrayBufferWriter`1.WrittenSpan
member.summary: Returns the data written to the underlying buffer so far, as a .

member.name: P:Azure.Core.ArrayBufferWriter`1.WrittenCount
member.summary: Returns the amount of data written to the underlying buffer so far.

member.name: P:Azure.Core.ArrayBufferWriter`1.Capacity
member.summary: Returns the total amount of space within the underlying buffer.

member.name: P:Azure.Core.ArrayBufferWriter`1.FreeCapacity
member.summary: Returns the amount of space available that can still be written into without forcing the underlying buffer to grow.

member.name: M:Azure.Core.ArrayBufferWriter`1.Clear
member.summary: Clears the data written to the underlying buffer.
member.remarks: You must clear the before trying to re-use it.

member.name: M:Azure.Core.ArrayBufferWriter`1.Advance(System.Int32)
member.summary: Notifies that amount of data was written to the output /.
member.exception: Thrown when attempting to advance past the end of the underlying buffer.
member.remarks: You must request a new buffer after calling Advance to continue writing more data and cannot write to a previously acquired buffer.

member.name: M:Azure.Core.ArrayBufferWriter`1.GetMemory(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a to write to that is at least the requested length (specified by ). If no is provided (or it's equal to 0), some non-empty buffer is returned.
member.remarks: This will never return an empty .
There is no guarantee that successive calls will return the same buffer or the same-sized buffer.
You must request a new buffer after calling Advance to continue writing more data and cannot write to a previously acquired buffer.

member.name: M:Azure.Core.ArrayBufferWriter`1.GetSpan(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a to write to that is at least the requested length (specified by ). If no is provided (or it's equal to 0), some non-empty buffer is returned.
member.remarks: This will never return an empty .
There is no guarantee that successive calls will return the same buffer or the same-sized buffer.
You must request a new buffer after calling Advance to continue writing more data and cannot write to a previously acquired buffer.

member.name: T:Azure.Core.AzureResourceProviderNamespaceAttribute
member.summary: This attribute should be set on all client assemblies with value of one of the resource providers from the https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-resource-manager/management/azure-services-resource-providers list.

member.name: T:Azure.Core.Pipeline.ActivityExtensions
member.summary: HACK HACK HACK. Some runtime environments like Azure.Functions downgrade System.Diagnostic.DiagnosticSource package version causing method not found exceptions in customer apps This type is a temporary workaround to avoid the issue.

member.name: T:Azure.Core.Pipeline.TaskExtensions.Enumerable`1
member.summary: Both and are defined as public structs so that foreach can use duck typing to call and avoid heap memory allocation. Please don't delete this method and don't make these types private.

member.name: T:Azure.Core.ArmOperationHelpers`1
member.summary: This implements the ARM scenarios for LROs. It is highly recommended to read the ARM spec prior to modifying this code: https://github.com/Azure/azure-resource-manager-rpc/blob/master/v1.0/Addendum.md#asynchronous-operations Other reference documents include: https://github.com/Azure/autorest/blob/master/docs/extensions/readme.md#x-ms-long-running-operation https://github.com/Azure/adx-documentation-pr/blob/master/sdks/LRO/LRO_AzureSDK.md
member.typeparam: The final result of the LRO.

member.name: P:Azure.Core.CodeGenModelAttribute.Usage
member.summary: Gets or sets a coma separated list of additional model usage modes. Allowed values: model, error, intput, output.

member.name: P:Azure.Core.CodeGenModelAttribute.Formats
member.summary: Gets or sets a coma separated list of additional model serialization formats.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.AllowNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that null is allowed as an input even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DisallowNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that null is disallowed as an input even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that an output may be null even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that an output will not be null even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that when a method returns , the parameter may be null even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter may be null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that when a method returns , the parameter will not be null even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the output will be non-null if the named parameter is non-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the associated parameter name.
member.param: The associated parameter name. The output will be non-null if the argument to the parameter specified is non-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute.ParameterName
member.summary: Gets the associated parameter name.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute
member.summary: Applied to a method that will never return under any circumstance.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method will not return if the associated Boolean parameter is passed the specified value.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified parameter value.
member.param: The condition parameter value. Code after the method will be considered unreachable by diagnostics if the argument to the associated parameter matches this value.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute.ParameterValue
member.summary: Gets the condition parameter value.
